FlavourText.original:
The respect of Karui warriors is hard to earn,
but lasts a lifetime... and beyond.
FlavourText.zh_cn:
卡鲁战士的尊重来之不易，
但会持续一生……乃至身后。

group.original: Recover {0}% of Missing Life before being [Hit|Hit] by an Enemy

translation.zh_cn: 被敌人[Hit|击中]前回复已损失生命的 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 遭敵人[Hit|擊中]前恢復失去生命的 {0}%
